channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Passengers from virus-stricken cruise ship fly to home countries for monitoring
item.description: A French woman and an American have tested positive for the hantavirus as nations around the world repatriated passengers from a cruise ship hit by an outbreak and quarantine or isolate them.

item.title: Man charged in White House correspondents’ dinner attack pleads not guilty
Trump says he’ll move to suspend federal gasoline tax. He can’t do it on his own
